error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

set_password.title: Set Password
set_password.description: You signed in with a social account. Set a password to also sign in with email.
set_password.force_description: First time signing in with a social account. Please set a password to unify your login methods.

error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.description: Enter your account email and we will send you a password reset link.
forgot_password.sent_description: If this email exists, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
forgot_password.success: If this email exists, a reset link has been sent.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.description: Enter your new password below to complete the reset.
reset_password.invalid_description: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.

error.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired
error.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.tip: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
